[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 110101111 7
1 111111101 8
2 111111111 a
3 111101101 7
4 110101111 7
5 111111101 8
6 111111111 a
7 001101101 5

70 07 111111111 a match 2 6

24 42 001101101 5 match 7
